text:
We are providing wide range of IT services for small business companies
Managed On-Demand UNIX Servers. Time efficient and affordable! Relevant Internet software is pre-installed and maintained centrally. User benefit: the convenience of a homepage account, combined with the flexibility of a dedicated server. No hassle with security updates etc.
highly configurable MTA offers (E)SMTP, POP3, IMAP4 and Webmail SSL/TLS secured services. It includes an integrated list server and connectors for Antivirus and Antispam applications.
